MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant Uber's demurrer.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Uber's demurrer is ordered off calendar for the parties' failure to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
